candidate_definitions.text: Semantic Search demo featuring UForm, USearch, UCall, and StreamLit, to visual and retrieve from image datasets, similar to "CLIP Retrieval"
![USearch Images animated text to image multi-modal AI search](assets/usearch-images-slow.gif)
Deep-learning system proposed by HFL for SemEval-2022 Task 8: Multilingual News Similarity

Here, we provide the implementation of our winning system in Semeval-2022 Task8 —— Multilingual News Article Similarity. This is a competition about assessing the similarity of multilingual and crosslingual news articles which covers 18 language pairs.
